##RRUFFID=R060722
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Li_2_Ca_3_Be_3_(SiO_4_)_3_F_2_
##LOCALITY=Xianghualing mine near Zenzhou, Hunan Province, China
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins and George Guanghua Liu
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless rounded crystals and fragments
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 12.867 b: 12.867 c: 12.867 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 2130.27 crystal system: cubic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=785
